## Validation

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Desktop app opened locally, if UI/Electron behavior changed
- [ ] `POST /usage` checked, if usage collection changed

## Privacy checklist

- [ ] Does not log prompt text, completion text, messages, or request bodies
- [ ] Does not log API keys or Authorization headers
- [ ] Does not add cloud upload, telemetry, analytics, or third-party tracking
- [ ] Keeps usage data local by default
- [ ] Uses editable sample pricing language instead of claiming official live prices
